OptionDescription.SourceString: Should fullscreen be opt-in or forcibly turned on. Note that this also removes the option to dismiss fullscreen from the player. You will need to manually remove it or let the video end.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Should fullscreen be opt-in or forcibly turned on. Note that this also removes the option to dismiss fullscreen from the player. You will need to manually remove it or let the video end.
